Ryan Williams Cleared for India After FIFA Approval

Nov 21, 2025

Ryan Williams Cleared for India After FIFA Approval

Ryan Williams has officially become eligible for selection to the Indian football team after receiving FIFA approval for a change of member association, the All India Football Federation (AIFF) confirmed on November 19, 2025. The 32-year-old forward, who plays for Bengaluru FC in the Indian Super League, relinquished his Australian citizenship to acquire Indian nationality, fulfilling all FIFA requirements.

FIFA Approves Ryan Williams’ Change of Association

The AIFF announced that FIFA’s Players’ Status Chamber formally approved Williams’ request to switch national associations:

“Following the submission, FIFA reviewed the request in alignment with the standards set out in the RGAS. The Chamber delivered its decision on November 19, confirming that all eligibility criteria had been satisfied.”

With this ruling, Williams is now officially eligible to represent India in international football.

Background of Ryan Williams

Early Career

Born in Perth, Australia, Williams’ mother hails from Mumbai, while his father is from Kent, England. He represented Australia at U-20 and U-23 levels and played as a second-half substitute for the senior team in a 2019 friendly against South Korea. His professional career includes stints at Fulham and Portsmouth before joining Bengaluru FC in 2023.

Indian Super League and National Team Prospects

Williams’ presence in the ISL has brought him closer to Indian football. He was with the Indian squad in Dhaka for the 2027 Asian Cup qualifying match against Bangladesh, but was not eligible to play at that time due to pending FIFA clearance. With approval now in place, he can participate in future matches, adding depth and experience to India’s attacking options.

Significance for Indian Football

Williams becomes one of the few foreign-born players to represent India, following in the footsteps of Izumi Arata, a Japan-born player who gained Indian citizenship in 2012 and played nine matches for the Blue Tigers. His inclusion strengthens the squad ahead of upcoming international tournaments, bringing in international experience from Australia and England.

Eligibility Rules and FIFA Clearance

The process involved strict adherence to FIFA regulations. Williams’ change of association was carefully reviewed to ensure compliance with all guidelines, including relinquishing his previous nationality. This clearance allows him to feature in qualifiers, friendlies, and other official competitions under the Indian banner.

Looking Ahead

The inclusion of Ryan Williams opens up tactical possibilities for coach Khalid Jamil. Known for his versatility as a forward, Williams can enhance India’s attacking options and bring valuable international experience. Fans and analysts alike will be watching closely as he potentially makes his debut for the Blue Tigers in upcoming fixtures.

The official FIFA clearance of Ryan Williams marks a historic moment for Indian football, signaling the arrival of a seasoned international player ready to strengthen the national team.
